titles.ar: باب أَنَّهُ إِذَا مَاتَ الرَّجُلُ حَلَّ دَيْنُهُ
titles.en: Chapter 22 – When the man dies, his debts become due

titles.ar: باب أَنَّهُ إِذَا مَاتَ الرَّجُلُ حَلَّ دَيْنُهُ
titles.en: Chapter 22 – When the man dies, his debts become due

segments: قَالَ لِي أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِذَا مَاتَ الرَّجُلُ حَلَّ مَا لَهُ وَ مَا عَلَيْهِ مِنَ الدَّيْنِ .
arabic.text: قَالَ لِي أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِذَا مَاتَ الرَّجُلُ حَلَّ مَا لَهُ وَ مَا عَلَيْهِ مِنَ الدَّيْنِ .

segments: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar, from one of his companions, from Khalaf Bin Hammad, from Ismail Bin Abu Qurrat, from Abu Baseer who said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said to me: ‘When the man dies, it frees up what is for him and what is against him, from the debts’.
en.hubeali.text:
Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar, from one of his companions, from Khalaf Bin Hammad, from Ismail Bin Abu Qurrat, from Abu Baseer who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said to me: ‘When the man dies, it frees up what is for him and what is against him, from the debts’.

segments: 1. Abu Ali al-Ash’ariy has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd al-Jabbar from certain persons of his people from Khalaf ibn Hammad from ‘Isma’il ibn abu Qurrah from abu Basir who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘When a man dies, payment of all of loans for and against him opens up (becomes due). 5 ”
en.sarwar.text: 1. Abu Ali al-Ash’ariy has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd al-Jabbar from certain persons of his people from Khalaf ibn Hammad from ‘Isma’il ibn abu Qurrah from abu Basir who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘When a man dies, payment of all of loans for and against him opens up (becomes due). 5 ”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/51)
gradings.label: مرسل مجهول
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/51)

narratorChain.raw: أَبُو عَلِيٍّ الْأَشْعَرِيُّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الْجَبَّارِ عَنْ بَعْضِ أَصْحَابِهِ عَنْ خَلَفِ بْنِ حَمَّادٍ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِيلَ بْنِ أَبِي قُرَّةَ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ قَالَ

titles.ar: باب أَنَّهُ إِذَا مَاتَ الرَّجُلُ حَلَّ دَيْنُهُ
titles.en: Chapter 22 – When the man dies, his debts become due

segments: الرَّجُلِ يَمُوتُ وَ عَلَيْهِ دَيْنٌ فَيَضْمَنُهُ ضَامِنٌ لِلْغُرَمَاءِ فَقَالَ إِذَا رَضِيَ بِهِ الْغُرَمَاءُ فَقَدْ بَرِئَتْ ذِمَّةُ الْمَيِّتِ .
arabic.text: الرَّجُلِ يَمُوتُ وَ عَلَيْهِ دَيْنٌ فَيَضْمَنُهُ ضَامِنٌ لِلْغُرَمَاءِ فَقَالَ إِذَا رَضِيَ بِهِ الْغُرَمَاءُ فَقَدْ بَرِئَتْ ذِمَّةُ الْمَيِّتِ .

segments: Muhamamd Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Mahboub, from Abdullah Bin Sinan,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding the man who is dying and upon him are debts, so a guarantor undertakes responsibility to the creditors. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘When the creditors are pleased with it, so it frees the deceased from the responsibility’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhamamd Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Mahboub, from Abdullah Bin Sinan,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding the man who is dying and upon him are debts, so a guarantor undertakes responsibility to the creditors. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘When the creditors are pleased with it, so it frees the deceased from the responsibility’.

segments: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Mahbub from ‘Abd Allah ibn Sinan who has said the following: “About the case of a man who dies indebted and someone guarantees the creditors to pay them on behalf of the deceased, abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘If the creditors agree with such guarantees, the deceased becomes free of his responsibility for payment of debts he owed.”’
en.sarwar.text: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Mahbub from ‘Abd Allah ibn Sinan who has said the following: “About the case of a man who dies indebted and someone guarantees the creditors to pay them on behalf of the deceased, abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘If the creditors agree with such guarantees, the deceased becomes free of his responsibility for payment of debts he owed.”’

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/52)
gradings.label: صحيح
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/52)

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فِي
